rulings.Case Title: ANITA LEE VS. EDITH Y. WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel 97,500 Credit On Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 5, 2021 line 1. Motion To Compel 97,500 Credit On Judgment is continued to April 28, 2021 for Plaintiff to provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than April 9, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)
